curation_notes: Pre-assigned as command-injection from CWE-94, but the patch fixes a Zip Slip (path traversal) vulnerability in _unzip_iter where zipfile.extractall() is called without validating member paths. The advisory title explicitly states 'Zip Slip Vulnerability' and the fix adds path canonicalization and traversal checks. Reclassified to path-traversal. Primary location derived from the patch diff: only nltk/downloader.py was modified (non-test). No sibling files contain similar extractall() calls without validation.
